title: hypericum scabridum
intro: Hypericum scabridum, also known as shrubby St John's wort or rough-leaved St John's wort, is a shrub-like perennial plant belonging to the St John's wort family (Hypericaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Hypericum scabridum include wound healing, reducing anxiety and stress, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. The herbal preparations of this plant can be consumed as teas, infusions, or tinctures, although it's essential to consult a healthcare professional before using it as a treatment for any medical condition.
